summary: COF in strong uptrend (+24% in 30 days), base rate ~53% for 6-day positive returns, momentum adds small boost but mean reversion risk exists
content: COF close prices: Jan 5 = $250.51, Jan 2 = $247.93. Strong uptrend from $202.22 on Nov 20. 23/29 recent days were positive. Monte Carlo with recent vol (1.09% daily): 53.6% base rate for positive 6-day return with normal drift. Capital One-Discover merger is structural catalyst. No specific earnings event in Jan 6-14 window (bank earnings typically later in January). S&P 500 roughly flat recently.
